shortDescription: Irish Immigration · Stamp 2 · IRP card · Approved course on ILEP

policyAlert.summary: Confirm visa fees and financial thresholds on irishimmigration.ie before quoting.

alert.title: IRP registration after arrival
alert.body: Students must register for Irish Residence Permit within 90 days of arrival. Verify current fee on irishimmigration.ie.

about.label: Description
about.value: Student Route visa for study at a Ireland institution holding a valid sponsor licence. Requires Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies (CAS) and online Irish Immigration Service Delivery application.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Valid CAS · Proof of funds · English at required level · Genuine student intent · TB test if from listed country

about.label: Financial requirement
about.value: Tuition minus deposit paid + living costs (London vs outside London rates). 28-day funds rule applies.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Ireland Visas and Immigration (Irish Immigration Service Delivery) — Home Office

about.label: After approval
about.value: BRP or digital status; maintain attendance, sponsor reporting, and work hour limits.

eligibility.criterion: English language at SELT level (if required)
eligibility.note: IELTS Irish Immigration Service Delivery or exempt pathway

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, analyse refusal letter and address specific grounds before reapplication with new CAS if needed.

redFlags.title: 28-day funds rule breach
redFlags.description: Funds not held continuously for 28 days or balance drops below threshold.
redFlags.fix: Maintain required balance 28 days; use dated bank statements

redFlags.title: CAS / course mismatch
redFlags.description: Course level inconsistent with prior study or career plan.
redFlags.fix: Align CAS course with academic progression; strong personal statement

redFlags.title: Wrong IHS payment
redFlags.description: Incorrect IHS amount or course duration entered.
redFlags.fix: Calculate IHS on irishimmigration.ie calculator before payment

redFlags.title: TB test issues
redFlags.description: Wrong clinic, expired certificate, or missing for India.
redFlags.fix: Use Irish Immigration Service Delivery-approved clinic; certificate valid 6 months

redFlags.title: Prior refusals not addressed
redFlags.description: Ireland or other refusals hidden in application.

redFlags.title: Document quality
redFlags.description: Blurry scans, wrong translations, or inconsistent names.
redFlags.fix: Certified translations; consistent naming across docs

faqs.q: Can we guarantee Student visa approval?
faqs.a: No. Irish Immigration Service Delivery assesses each application. Strong CAS and funds help but approval is never guaranteed.

faqs.q: How much funds for London vs outside London?
faqs.a: Living costs differ—verify current amounts on irishimmigration.ie. Plus remaining tuition after deposit shown on CAS.

faqs.q: What is the 28-day rule?
faqs.a: Funds must remain at or above required amount for 28 consecutive days ending no more than 31 days before application.

faqs.q: Can spouse join on Student visa?
faqs.a: Dependants allowed only if course meets specific criteria (e.g., postgraduate level certain duration). Check current rules.

faqs.q: Is IELTS Irish Immigration Service Delivery mandatory?
faqs.a: If SELT required, must be Irish Immigration Service Delivery-approved test from approved centre. Some nationals/courses may be exempt.

faqs.q: When to apply?
faqs.a: Up to 6 months before course start if applying from outside Ireland. Do not apply without valid CAS.

faqs.q: Can student work?
faqs.a: Limited hours during term; rules on irishimmigration.ie. Cannot work as professional sportsperson or doctor in training.

faqs.q: What after course completion?
faqs.a: Discuss Graduate Route eligibility separately—requires successful completion at eligible institution.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Student Route visa for study at a Ireland institution holding a valid sponsor licence. Requires Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies (CAS) and online Irish Immigration Service Delivery application.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Valid CAS · Proof of funds · English at required level · Genuine student intent · TB test if from listed country

faqs.q: What is Financial requirement for this service?
faqs.a: Tuition minus deposit paid + living costs (London vs outside London rates). 28-day funds rule applies.

faqs.q: Important note on Financial requirement?
faqs.a: Tuition minus deposit paid + living costs (London vs outside London rates). 28-day funds rule applies.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: Ireland Visas and Immigration (Irish Immigration Service Delivery) — Home Office

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: BRP or digital status; maintain attendance, sponsor reporting, and work hour limits.

faqs.q: Is CAS from licensed Ireland sponsor required?
faqs.a: CAS number valid and unused

faqs.q: Is Financial requirement met (28-day rule) required?
faqs.a: Funds held 28 consecutive days

faqs.q: Is English language at SELT level (if required) required?
faqs.a: IELTS Irish Immigration Service Delivery or exempt pathway

faqs.q: Is TB test certificate (if applicable) required?
faqs.a: Required for Indian nationals

faqs.q: Is ATAS certificate (if course requires) required?
faqs.a: Check CAS and course code

faqs.q: Is Genuine student / credible study plan required?
faqs.a: Genuine student / credible study plan is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Immigration history disclosed required?
faqs.a: Immigration history disclosed is typically required.

faqs.q: What is the Processing time?
faqs.a: 3–8w — Outside Ireland standard

faqs.q: What is the Government fee?
faqs.a: €60+ (verify current fee) — + IHS per year of course

faqs.q: What is the Our approval rate?
faqs.a: 89% — ~76% industry benchmark

faqs.q: What is the Required docs?
faqs.a: 13 — + financial evidence

faqs.q: What is the Consultancy fee?
faqs.a: See fee tab — + govt & IHS

faqs.q: What if the client has 28-day funds rule breach?
faqs.a: Maintain required balance 28 days; use dated bank statements

faqs.q: Why is 28-day funds rule breach a problem?
faqs.a: Funds not held continuously for 28 days or balance drops below threshold.

faqs.q: What if the client has CAS / course mismatch?
faqs.a: Align CAS course with academic progression; strong personal statement

faqs.q: Why is CAS / course mismatch a problem?
faqs.a: Course level inconsistent with prior study or career plan.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa approval; use approved-language only in marketing
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, Irish Immigration Service Delivery fee, IHS, and third-party costs
TB test and SELT must be from Irish Immigration Service Delivery-approved providers only
proTips: Verify sponsor licence on register before CAS fee
Calculate IHS with irishimmigration.ie calculator—save payment receipt
TB test at approved clinic early to avoid delays
28-day funds: set calendar reminder for client
Cross-check CAS details against passport before submit
postApproval: Remind sponsor reporting and attendance obligations
Explain work hour limits during term
Discuss Graduate Route timeline if eligible

staffNotes.text: Second review for all files with prior Ireland refusal.

quiz.question: Mandatory document from Ireland institution?
options: LOA only
CAS
LMIA
CoS
quiz.explanation: CAS is required for Student Route application.

quiz.question: 28-day funds rule means:
options: Funds for 7 days
Funds at required level for 28 consecutive days
No bank statement needed
Loan letter only
quiz.explanation: Core financial requirement for Ireland student visa.

quiz.question: Indian applicants generally need:
options: No medical tests
TB test from approved clinic
Only police cert
US medical
quiz.explanation: TB test required for India.

quiz.question: IHS is:
options: Optional tip
Immigration Health Surcharge for NHS access
University tuition
CAS fee
quiz.explanation: Mandatory payment for most Ireland visa routes.

quiz.question: Counselors must never:
options: Check CAS details
Guarantee visa approval
Verify IHS amount
Track TB test
quiz.explanation: Firm policy prohibits guarantees.

dos: Verify CAS and sponsor licence before submission
Complete TB test at approved clinic
donts: Do not guarantee Student visa approval
Do not apply without valid unused CAS
Do not use funds that drop below threshold in 28-day window
Do not hide Ireland immigration history
Do not quote fees without checking irishimmigration.ie
mistakes: Wrong London/outside London living cost amount
Non-Irish Immigration Service Delivery IELTS when SELT required
